scripts.db:sync: npx supabase db query < supabase/roles.sql && npx supabase db query < supabase/grant_nexusapp.sql && npx supabase db query < supabase/grant_nexus_app.sql && npx supabase db pull
scripts.db:reset: npx supabase db query < supabase/roles.sql && npx supabase db query < supabase/grant_nexusapp.sql && npx supabase db query < supabase/grant_nexus_app.sql && npx supabase db reset
scripts.test:db: docker-compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d && sleep 10 && npm run db:migrate:test && npm test && docker-compose -f docker-compose.test.yml down
